description: Guinness aired a commercial titled 'Basketball' in late 2013, showing friends playing wheelchair basketball, with only one player actually using a wheelchair. The ad was widely celebrated for its emotional depth and inclusiveness, becoming a standard for effective 'purpose-driven' beer advertising.

key_events.description: Ad premieres; immediate positive reception on social media for its emotional hook.
Disability advocacy groups release public statements praising the ad's authentic portrayal.
Ad wins multiple marketing industry awards for 'creative excellence'.
Guinness brand favorability metrics reach a five-year high in the UK and Ireland.

calibration_notes: Serves as a benchmark for high-consensus, positive-valence marketing campaigns with minimal controversy.
